recommended_next_tools.reason: Downstream tools often assume FASTA identifiers are unique.
Assembly-level evaluation can show whether ambiguity affects broader assembly quality.

findings.why_it_matters: Duplicate IDs can break indexing, annotation, mapping, and workflow joins.
findings.suggested_next_step: Rename records so every FASTA identifier is unique before running downstream tools.

actions.reason: Downstream tools often assume FASTA identifiers are unique.

findings.why_it_matters: Invalid characters can make parsers, aligners, or annotation tools fail or misinterpret records.
findings.suggested_next_step: Inspect and correct non-IUPAC sequence symbols before continuing the workflow.

actions.reason: Invalid sequence symbols should be corrected or intentionally recoded before downstream analysis.

findings.message: Global N is 80.69% (threshold 5.00%), and 2 sequences exceed the per-sequence N threshold.
findings.why_it_matters: High N content can reduce mapping confidence and fragment annotation or polishing steps.
findings.suggested_next_step: Review assembly masking, coverage, and contigs with high N content before downstream analysis.

actions.reason: High ambiguity may indicate unresolved assembly regions or masking problems.
Assembly-level evaluation can show whether ambiguity affects broader assembly quality.

findings.message: 5 contigs are shorter than the 200 bp profile minimum.
findings.why_it_matters: Very short contigs often add noise to assembly statistics and downstream annotation.
findings.suggested_next_step: Filter or review tiny contigs before using the assembly in production workflows.

actions.reason: Short records may be noise, but should be reviewed before automatic removal.

findings.message: The longest N gap run is 101 bp, above the 100 bp profile limit.
findings.why_it_matters: Long gap runs can indicate unresolved assembly regions and may disrupt mapping or annotation.
findings.suggested_next_step: Inspect scaffolds with long N runs and consider gap closing or masking review.

actions.reason: Long gaps may require gap closing, masking review, or scaffold-level inspection.
